content: Gonorrhea: ceftriaxone 500mg IM single dose (<150kg) or 1g IM (≥150kg); add doxycycline 100mg BID x7 days if chlamydia not excluded. Pharyngeal gonorrhea requires test-of-cure 7-14 days post-treatment. Syphilis: primary/secondary/early latent - benzathine penicillin G 2.4 million units IM single dose; late latent/tertiary - 2.4 million units IM weekly x3 doses; neurosyphilis - aqueous crystalline penicillin G 18-24 million units IV daily x10-14 days. Chlamydia: doxycycline 100mg BID x7 days (preferred); azithromycin 1g single dose alternative (pregnancy). Genital herpes: acyclovir, valacyclovir, famciclovir for episodic/suppressive therapy. HPV: no treatment for virus itself; treat warts (imiquimod, podofilox, cryotherapy) and dysplasia. Partner notification and treatment essential.
